content:
Excited to share that I've joined Aequs.

Looking forward to learning, taking on new challenges, and contributing to the legal function while supporting business growth.

Grateful to everyone who has been part of this journey.

comment: Moving into an in-house role often means balancing legal risk with business velocity. The real impact comes from enabling decisions early, not just reviewing them later.
